config__KIND_TINT.body:
export const KIND_TINT: Record<NodeKind, string> = {
  component: '#25305a', // indigo
  hook:      '#1f3a36', // teal
  class:     '#34284a', // violet
  store:     '#3a3122', // amber
  module:    '#2b3340', // slate
  function:  '#21372a', // green
  type:      '#3a2630', // rose
  service:   '#1f3340', // steel
  event:     '#3a2545', // magenta
};

config__SHAPE_KIND.body:
export const SHAPE_KIND: Record<ShapeKind, NodeKind | null> = {
  rect: 'component',
  round: 'function',
  stadium: 'module',
  cylinder: 'store',
  diamond: 'function',
  circle: 'event',
  hex: 'service',
  note: 'type',
  group: null,
};

config__DEFAULTS.body:
export const DEFAULTS: Record<ShapeKind, ShapeDefault> = {
  rect: { w: 160, h: 56, label: 'Module' },
  round: { w: 160, h: 56, label: 'Process' },
  stadium: { w: 160, h: 50, label: 'Start' },
  cylinder: { w: 150, h: 64, label: 'Store' },
  diamond: { w: 150, h: 88, label: 'Decision?' },
  circle: { w: 96, h: 96, label: 'State' },
  hex: { w: 160, h: 64, label: 'Service' },
  note: { w: 190, h: 86, label: 'note...' },
  group: { w: 300, h: 200, label: 'Group' },
};

accepts: n: { color: string | null; kind?: NodeKind | null }

config__ShapeDefault.body: export interface ShapeDefault { w: number; h: number; label: string; }

config__Theme.body: export interface Theme { name: string; vars: Record<string, string>; }

config__FontDef.body: export interface FontDef { name: string; stack: string; }

context__createHooks.body:
export function createHooks(): Hooks {
  return {
    render: () => notWired('render'),
    sync: () => notWired('sync'),
    renderInspector: () => notWired('renderInspector'),
    drawMinimap: () => notWired('drawMinimap'),
    applyCam: () => notWired('applyCam'),
    persist: () => notWired('persist'),
    pushHistory: () => notWired('pushHistory'),
    updateUndoButtons: () => notWired('updateUndoButtons'),
    toast: () => notWired('toast'),
    showTab: () => notWired('showTab'),
    renderNavigator: () => notWired('renderNavigator'),
    renderSlice: () => notWired('renderSlice'),
    reroute: () => notWired('reroute'),
    rerouteEdges: () => notWired('rerouteEdges'),
    redrawWires: () => notWired('redrawWires'),
    redrawWiresFor: () => notWired('redrawWiresFor'),
    enterContainer: () => notWired('enterContainer'),
  };
}

frontmatter__matchFrontmatterLine.returns: { id: string; key: string; value: string; iface?: number } | null

accepts: parsed: { id: string; key: string; value: string; iface?: number }
base: { nodes: Record<string, DiagramNode>; edges: DiagramEdge[] }

state__frameTransform.returns: { x: number; y: number; z: number }

state__levelHeaderRect.returns: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number } | null

state__levelFitBounds.returns: { minX: number; minY: number; maxX: number; maxY: number } | null

state__worldBounds.returns: { minX: number; minY: number; maxX: number; maxY: number } | null

exporter__buildExportSVG.returns: { svg: string; W: number; H: number } | null

diffWorkspace__splitEdgeKey.returns: { from: string; to: string; style: string }

inspectorFrontmatter__ifaceBlockHtml.body:
function ifaceBlockHtml(ifIdx: number, iface: { name: string; accepts: string[]; returns: string[] }): string { return `
${IFACE_LISTS.map((key) => `
${ifaceListRowsHtml(ifIdx, key, iface[key])}
`).join('')}
`; }
accepts: iface: { name: string; accepts: string[]; returns: string[] }
deps: { selection: SelectionApi; view: ViewApi; camera: CameraApi }
